last_prompt: Implement the webhook notification system designed in ideas-webhook-notifications. Create cli/src/notifier.rs with an async `notify` function that sends an HTTP POST with a JSON payload (task id, status, timestamp, description) to each configured URL using reqwest. Add a `notify_webhooks: Vec<String>` field to Config in cli/src/types.rs (default empty, skip_serializing_if empty). Wire calls to `notify` in cli/src/ralph_loop.rs after task status transitions to InProgress, Completed, and Failed. Add `--notify-webhook <URL>` (multi-value) CLI flag in cli/src/cli.rs that appends to the config's webhook list. Ensure failures to reach a webhook are logged as warnings but do not abort the loop.
